context: Verify that the agent correctly identifies and triages a survey paper, applies the survey tag, populates all template sections appropriately, and routes the REFERENCE_INDEX.md entry to the Surveys category.

checklist.name: Paper classified with the survey tag
checklist.description: The agent assigns the 'survey' tag to this paper in the reference file frontmatter and/or in the REVIEWED.md entry.

checklist.name: references/<slug>.md is created
checklist.description: A new file is created at references/<slug>.md. The slug follows the <firstauthor-surname>-<topic> convention (e.g. zhang-survey-memory-mechanism).

checklist.name: TL;DR describes what the survey synthesises, not just that it exists
checklist.description: The TL;DR bullets describe the survey's scope, axes covered, or key findings — not just 'this is a survey of X'. Contains 3-8 bullets.

checklist.name: What's novel section addresses scope relative to prior surveys
checklist.description: The What's novel section explains what this survey covers that adjacent surveys do not, or what makes its taxonomy/framing distinctive.

checklist.name: Mechanism overview marks inapplicable subsections as N/A
checklist.description: Subsections of the mechanism overview that do not apply to a survey paper (e.g. compression path, eviction policy) are marked N/A rather than left blank or omitted entirely.

checklist.name: Evaluation section present with appropriately scoped claims
checklist.description: The evaluation section notes what the survey covers (benchmarks referenced, systems compared) and marks any coverage statistics as '(as reported)'.

checklist.name: Open questions section has substantive content
checklist.description: Open questions identifies at least one gap, limitation, or dated aspect of the survey — not just a placeholder.

checklist.name: REVIEWED.md summary table row includes survey tag
checklist.description: The row added to the REVIEWED.md summary table includes 'survey' in the notes or tags field, or the type column reflects the classification.

checklist.name: REVIEWED.md detailed section includes tags field with survey
checklist.description: The detailed section in REVIEWED.md includes a tags field that lists 'survey' among the assigned tags.

checklist.name: REFERENCE_INDEX.md entry placed under Surveys category
checklist.description: The new entry in REFERENCE_INDEX.md is placed in the Surveys section, not under a technique-specific category like Compression or Token budgeting.

checklist.name: No ANALYSIS-*.md file created during triage
checklist.description: The agent does not create any ANALYSIS-*.md file as part of this triage.

checklist.name: User offered promotion choice at the end
checklist.description: The agent ends by asking the user whether to promote, keep, or skip the paper.
